Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kit Knodsen, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Jewelry by Rosalina
Russell Longaway, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Kimberly Bakker

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Jewelry By Rosalina's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And Requests For Admission is moot and part and granted in part. Supplemental responses have been served. The second set of supplemental responses have not been verified. Defendant is ordered to verify the second set of supplemental responses within 10 days of notice of this order. The court will not determine the adequacy of the supplemental responses on this motion. The court finds that the initial responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $1,400, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2008 Set For Trial On Dec-08-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-20-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 318
